title: Everlasto 'Everstrong' Premium Quality Steel Core PVC Clothesline Washing Line 4.7mm Thick (Green, 4.7mm x 10M)
features: PREMIUM - A high quality plastic clothes line that will gives years of service.
THICK - At 4.7mm, the thickest steel core line on the market, holds pegs well.
STRONG - Made with a 7 strand cabled steel core for strength. This line will not sag.
DURABLE - Has a wipe clean, weatherpoof PVC outer for durability. A wipe with a damp cloth will have the line looking good as new!

PRACTICAL - Comes with two line tensioners to easily tighten the line at both ends. Simply feed through the tensioner and around a fixing point and back onto the tensioner. Once the line is loaded simply slide the tensioners along the line to add tension.
EVERLASTO - a quality Everlasto product from the UK's leading clothesline company James Lever of Bolton, UK cordage manufacturers since 1856.
description: A high quality plastic clothes line that will gives years of service. At 4.7mm, the thickest steel core line on the market, holds pegs well. Comes with two line tensioners to easily tighten the line at both ends. Simply feed through the tensioner and around a fixing point and back onto the tensioner. Once the line is loaded simply slide the tensioners along the line to add tension.
